title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at ET Money Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at ET Money Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
ET Money Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ET Money Ventures Solutions:
ET Money Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money Ventures Solutions!
